name: M-Resources Group Limited
summary: M-Resources Group Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in forestry and agricultural, financial services, cultural, and logistics businesses in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It is involved in timber logging, as well as the plantation and sale of wood and agricultural products. The company also plants and cultivates rubber trees for latex production; and distributes agricultural products. In addition, it provides securities brokerage and trading services; underwriting and placing services; asset management services; and loan financing services. Further, the company develops and upgrades Chinese cultural related online application. It owns three forests measuring 31,000 hectares in Kratie Province, the Kingdom of Cambodia. The company was formerly known as IR Resources Limited and changed its name to M-Resources Group Limited in April 2021. M-Resources Group Limited is based in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong.
